recalls.Description: Five Below is recalling two styles of tabletop fire pits due to potential fire hazards. One model features a smooth black base, while the other has a beveled gray base. Both designs come with a stainless-steel fuel cup, a lid, and a flame cover. The black fire pits are packaged in blue, yellow, and white boxes labeled 'Tabletop Fire Pit,' with UPC '1922343012788' and tracking number 'FO031124' on the back. The gray fire pits are in green boxes labeled 'Outdoor,' 'Easy Modern,' and 'Cement Tabletop Firepit,' with UPC '1922346316838' and tracking number 'FO011925.'
recalls.Title: Five Below Recalls Tabletop Fire Pits Due to Serious Burn Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Five Below at 844-452-3569 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email Recalls@FiveBelow.com, or visit https://www.fivebelow.com/info/five-below-recalls-tabletop-fire-pit. More details can also be found by clicking on 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of https://www.fivebelow.com/.

Recalled Five Below Tabletop Fire Pit packaging – smooth model
UPC 1922343012788 and tracking number FO031124 are printed on the back of the recalled Five Below tabletop fire pit packaging – smooth model
Recalled Five Below Tabletop Fire Pit – beveled model
Recalled Five Below Tabletop Fire Pit packaging – beveled model
UPC 1922346316838 and tracking number FO011925 are printed on the back of the recalled Five Below tabletop fire pit packaging - beveled model

Injuries.Name: Five Below has received one report of flames escaping from a tabletop firepit. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Five Below stores across the country and online at fivebelow.com from April 2024 through August 2025, priced between $2.50 and $5.

Distributors.Name: Five Below Inc., of Philadelphia, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: Risk of flash fire due to fuel leakage, leading to serious burn injuries.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the fire pits immediately and contact Five Below for a full refund. Returns can be made for a refund in the original payment method, or consumers can email a photo of the fire pit to receive a refund check or store credit. Disposal of the recalled items is advised, and proof of purchase is not necessary.

recalls.metaDescription: Five Below recalls tabletop fire pits due to serious burn injury risks. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.
